/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkeslua.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslua.so CMakeFiles/fawkeslua.dir/context_watcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslua.dir/trigger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslua.dir/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslua.dir/exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkeslua.dir/interface_importer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lyaml-cpp -lsqlite3 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lrt -ldl -lpthread -luuid /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib64 -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto -lstdc++ -lm
